title: Rutu
content:
{{Top|fga|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Rutu |homeworld=[[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]]{{KOTORbackups|13}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]]{{CSWECite|III|116|Rutu}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|In addition to the already-reported promotion of Saul Karath of the ''Courageous'' to Rear Admiral, the latest promotions were handed down from the Republic Navy …
'''To Lieutenant:'''
Rutu of Moltok.|The Admiral's List|}} '''Rutu''' was a native of [[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of huge [[Water/Legends|rain]]-[[Tree/Legends|forests]]''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'' located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] The [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Republic officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. This war, between the Galactic Republic and the resurgent forces of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], began in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], where the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorians]] made a three-pronged assault against the Republic in [[3963 BBY]]. In the aftermath of this assault, known by the Republic media as the "Onslaught," Rutu received a promotion to the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. His promotion, reported in the [[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition|Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication of the Republic Navy, occurred alongside that of notable officer [[Saul Karath]] to [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]]. ==Behind the scenes== Rutu was created by [[John Jackson Miller]], the author of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], and was mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', appended to [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]]. This [[in-universe]] news source is designed as "an official communique for the Republic providing news from the 'regular navy' point of view," inspired by the "Napoleonic-era Britain's Naval Chronicle."{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=Help/Boards/viewtopic.php?p=143036|thread=News from the world of KOTOR -- literally!|user=John Jackson Miller|date=2006-12-18|time=12:27 pm}} on the [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse Forums]] {{C|Posted 12/18/2006 12.27 PM by John Jackson Miller}} Some of the promotions presented here are said to be confirmations of ones received on the battlefield, but it is not specified which these are or which are regular promotions. In the original source, Rutu was not given either a species or gender; however, a subsequent entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' specified that the officer was a Ho'Din male. ==Appearances== *{{KOTORbackups|13}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rutu |pl=Rutu }} [[Category:Ho'Din]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Republic Navy officers]]
